scenario_title: Cognitive overload from English-language videos with Spanish subtitles
minimal_context: The student is working individually in the computer lab, watching an English-language instructional video with Spanish subtitles about writing out math equations.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please watch the video on your computer screen to see how to write out the math equations.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I am trying to watch it, but the video is in English and I have to use the Spanish subtitles.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Just keep watching and try your best to follow along.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: It is too fast. It requires me to read subtitles while also watching someone write out math equations, and the subtitles have unfamiliar terms and new words.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: What do you think you should do next?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Visibly asking the teacher for help) I need you to show me how to do it. The teacher can teach me more than the video.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Please watch the video on your computer screen to see how to write out the math equations.

STUDENT: I am trying to watch it, but the video is in English and I have to use the Spanish subtitles.

TUTOR: Just keep watching and try your best to follow along.

STUDENT: It is too fast. It requires me to read subtitles while also watching someone write out math equations, and the subtitles have unfamiliar terms and new words.

TUTOR: What do you think you should do next?

STUDENT: (Visibly asking the teacher for help) I need you to show me how to do it. The teacher can teach me more than the video.

task.content: watching someone write out math equations

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: require students to read subtitles while also watching someone write out math equations
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: visibly asking the teacher for help more frequently than in the traditional classes
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: presented a reading challenge to the student
related_quotes: The teacher can teach me more than the video.

behavior_patterns.condition: The subtitles also frequently contained unfamiliar terms and new words
